metadata.description: Name of the Data Collection Rule for AWS CloudTrail logs.
Azure region for the DCR resource.
Full resource ID of the Log Analytics workspace (e.g., /subscriptions/{sub}/resourceGroups/{rg}/providers/Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces/{name}).

properties.description: DCR for ingesting AWS CloudTrail logs into the native AWSCloudTrail Sentinel table via the Logs Ingestion API. Schema aligned with https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-monitor/reference/tables/awscloudtrail

columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: Timestamp of the CloudTrail event (ISO 8601).

columns.name: AwsEventId
columns.description: GUID generated by CloudTrail to uniquely identify each event.

columns.name: EventName
columns.description: The requested API action name.

columns.name: EventSource
columns.description: The AWS service the request was made to.

columns.name: EventTypeName
columns.description: Event type: AwsApiCall, AwsServiceEvent, AwsConsoleAction, AwsConsoleSignIn, AwsVPCEEvents.

columns.name: EventVersion
columns.description: CloudTrail log event format version.

columns.name: AWSRegion
columns.description: AWS Region where the request was made.

columns.name: AwsRequestId
columns.description: Deprecated — use AwsRequestId_ instead.

columns.name: AwsRequestId_
columns.description: The value that identifies the request, generated by the called service.

columns.name: Category
columns.description: Event category: Management, Data, or NetworkActivity.

columns.name: OperationName
columns.description: Operation name (maps to EventName).

columns.name: SourceIpAddress
columns.description: IP address the request was made from.

columns.name: UserAgent
columns.description: Agent through which the request was made.

columns.name: ErrorCode
columns.description: AWS service error code if the request returned an error.

columns.name: ErrorMessage
columns.description: Error description if the request returned an error.

columns.name: ManagementEvent
columns.description: Whether the event is a management event.

columns.name: ReadOnly
columns.description: Whether the operation is read-only.

columns.name: APIVersion
columns.description: API version associated with the AwsApiCall eventType.

columns.name: RecipientAccountId
columns.description: Account ID that received this event.

columns.name: SharedEventId
columns.description: GUID for cross-account CloudTrail events from the same action.

columns.name: VpcEndpointId
columns.description: VPC endpoint ID for requests made from a VPC.

columns.name: EC2RoleDelivery
columns.description: EC2 role delivery identifier.

columns.name: RequestParameters
columns.description: Parameters sent with the request (JSON string).

columns.name: ResponseElements
columns.description: Response elements for mutating actions (JSON string).

columns.name: AdditionalEventData
columns.description: Additional event data not in request/response (JSON string).

columns.name: Resources
columns.description: Resources accessed in the event (JSON string).

columns.name: ServiceEventDetails
columns.description: Service event details (JSON string).

columns.name: UserIdentityType
columns.description: Type of IAM identity: Root, IAMUser, AssumedRole, FederatedUser, AWSAccount, AWSService.

columns.name: UserIdentityPrincipalId
columns.description: Unique identifier for the entity that made the call.

columns.name: UserIdentityArn
columns.description: ARN of the principal that made the call.

columns.name: UserIdentityAccountId
columns.description: Account that owns the entity granting permissions.

columns.name: UserIdentityAccessKeyId
columns.description: Access key ID used to sign the request.

columns.name: UserIdentityUserName
columns.description: Friendly name of the identity that made the call.

columns.name: UserIdentityInvokedBy
columns.description: Name of the AWS service that made the request.

columns.name: UserIdentityUserId
columns.description: User ID of the identity.

columns.name: UserIdentityStoreArn
columns.description: IAM Identity Center store ARN for federated identity operations.

columns.name: SessionMfaAuthenticated
columns.description: Whether MFA was used for the session.

columns.name: SessionCreationDate
columns.description: Date and time when the temporary credentials were issued.

columns.name: SessionIssuerType
columns.description: Session issuer type (e.g., Role).

columns.name: SessionIssuerPrincipalId
columns.description: Session issuer principal ID.

columns.name: SessionIssuerArn
columns.description: Session issuer ARN.

columns.name: SessionIssuerAccountId
columns.description: Session issuer account ID.

columns.name: SessionIssuerUserName
columns.description: Session issuer friendly name.

columns.name: TlsVersion
columns.description: TLS version used in the API call.

columns.name: CipherSuite
columns.description: Cipher suite used in the API call.

columns.name: ClientProvidedHostHeader
columns.description: Client-provided host name in the API call.

columns.name: CidrIp
columns.description: CIDR IP from requestParameters for security group rules.

columns.name: DestinationPort
columns.description: Destination port from requestParameters.

columns.name: IpProtocol
columns.description: IP protocol from requestParameters.

columns.name: SourcePort
columns.description: Source port from requestParameters.
